title: baccharis macrantha subsp. pastoensis
intro: Baccharis macrantha subsp. pastoensis, also known as Pasto Balsam, is a plant species within the Baccharis genus, specifically a subspecies of the Baccharis macrantha plant. It has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Pasto Balsam include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
